rulings.Case Title: VIOLET FONG HOM VS. CYNTHIA JONE FONG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, January 28, 2011, line 2, PLAINTIFF VIOLET HOM'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION. MOTION OF PLAINTIFF FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AS TO EXISTENCE OF DUTY TO SELL PROPERTY AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR SPECIFIC PERFORMANCE AND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR PARTITION - ALL DENIED. THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER E-MAILS CONSTITUTE AN AGREEMENT. ALSO TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT WHETHER DEFENDANTS CONSENTED TO AGREE BY E-MAIL. SEE CIVIL CODE 1633.5b. =(302/AJR)
